metadata.description: Self-hosted best-practice plugins: UI/UX stacks, frameworks, databases, architecture, design patterns, testing, security, API design, dev environments, and the taskmaster clarification-to-execution workflow suite.

plugins.name: ui-ux
plugins.description: UI/UX best practices with per-stack skills: shadcn/ui, Tailwind, CSS3, Bootstrap, CSS Grid, Flexbox — plus shadcn theme creation with a live colour-preview URL. Includes /ui-ux:review, /ui-ux:theme, and a ui-ux-reviewer agent.

plugins.name: react
plugins.description: React best practices: hooks rules, render/memo performance, state management, component patterns. Includes /react:review.

plugins.name: react-native
plugins.description: React Native best practices: list performance, navigation, platform-specific code, animations. Includes /react-native:review.

plugins.name: vue2
plugins.description: Vue 2.7 best practices: Composition API backport, defineProperty reactivity caveats, Vue 3 migration readiness. Includes /vue2:review.

plugins.name: vue3
plugins.description: Vue 3 best practices: script setup, composables, ref/reactive pitfalls, Pinia. Includes /vue3:review.

plugins.name: php
plugins.description: PHP best practices: strict types, === discipline, PSR-4/PSR-12 conventions, version-aware advice pinned to the composer.json floor with a per-version leverage map (8.1-8.5), exceptions, DateTimeImmutable, boundary security, value objects, static analysis. Includes /php:review.

plugins.name: laravel
plugins.description: Laravel best practices: Eloquent N+1 prevention, form requests, service layer, queues, policies. Includes /laravel:review.

plugins.name: livewire
plugins.description: Livewire 3 best practices: component conventions, wire:model modifiers, performance, Alpine interop. Includes /livewire:review.

plugins.name: sql
plugins.description: Engine-agnostic SQL best practices: sargable predicates, join correctness, composite index logic, NULL traps, transactions, constraints, keyset pagination, additive migrations, parameterization. Includes /sql:review.

plugins.name: mysql
plugins.description: MySQL 8.0+ best practices: InnoDB clustered-PK design, utf8mb4, strict sql_mode, online DDL and metadata locks, gap locking, JSON limits, 8.0-8.4 LTS version leverage. Includes /mysql:review.

plugins.name: mariadb
plugins.description: MariaDB 10.6+ best practices: not-MySQL divergences, RETURNING, sequences, system-versioned tables, native UUID type, uca1400 collations, Galera awareness. Includes /mariadb:review.

plugins.name: postgresql
plugins.description: PostgreSQL 14+ best practices: MVCC/vacuum reality, timestamptz/jsonb/uuid types, partial/expression/GIN/BRIN indexes, lock-aware migrations, ON CONFLICT/RETURNING, version leverage through 17/18. Includes /postgresql:review.

plugins.name: code-architecture
plugins.description: Engineering process: plan-before-code, YAGNI checks, task orchestration, work verification, low-cognitive-load code, KISS/DRY simplicity principles. Includes /code-architecture:plan|verify|yagni and an architecture-reviewer agent.

plugins.name: design-patterns
plugins.description: Design pattern selection: which pattern fits where, and when NOT to use one. Includes /design-patterns:suggest.

plugins.name: api-docs-first
plugins.description: Verify current API docs before writing integration code; asks for a URL or file when docs are not visible. Includes /api-docs-first:check and a UserPromptSubmit reminder hook.

plugins.name: taskmaster
plugins.description: Interrogation-first task clarification: batched clarifying questions against an ambiguity ledger, ASCII/HTML mockups on a single always-live auto-reload preview URL for visual decisions, then a spec and single-prompt task cards. Includes /taskmaster:task, a context-scout agent, and a thin-feature-prompt reminder hook. Pairs with stack-scan, task-runner, and code-architecture for the full workflow (see README).

plugins.name: task-runner
plugins.description: Disciplined task execution: one task at a time, scope locked, bounded verify-fix inner loop (max three cycles, then park with evidence), no unbounded outer loop, full-suite completion gate. Includes /task-runner:run.

plugins.name: stack-scan
plugins.description: Inventory the actual stack from composer/npm/yarn/pnpm/bun manifests and lockfiles, runtime pins, and docker/CI images; required-vs-installed table with drift, missing-lock, and EOL flags. Includes /stack-scan:report.

plugins.name: testing
plugins.description: Testing best practices: test pyramid and what to actually test, Pest/PHPUnit and Vitest/Jest idioms, Playwright/Dusk e2e discipline, factories and fixtures, mocking boundaries, flaky-test causes, coverage traps. Includes /testing:review.

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Security review for web apps: OWASP-aligned checks for injection, XSS, CSRF, authorization vs authentication, mass assignment, file uploads, secrets handling, and dependency audit — mapped to PHP/Laravel and JS/Vue specifics. Includes /security:review.

plugins.name: typescript
plugins.description: TypeScript best practices: strict mode as the floor, any vs unknown discipline, narrowing over assertions, generics restraint, satisfies, runtime validation at boundaries, tsconfig hygiene. Includes /typescript:review.

plugins.name: inertia
plugins.description: Inertia.js best practices (Laravel + Vue/React/Svelte adapters): partial reloads, deferred and lazy props, useForm flow, shared data via middleware, prop hygiene, SSR, code splitting, v1 vs v2 and adapter awareness. Includes /inertia:review.

plugins.name: api-design
plugins.description: REST API design: resource naming, status-code discipline, pagination/filtering/sorting conventions, versioning strategy, RFC 9457 error format, idempotency, Laravel API Resources. Includes /api-design:review.

plugins.name: dev-env
plugins.description: Dev environment initiator: scan composer/npm manifests, lockfiles, .env DSNs, and CI images, then generate a docker-compose.yml and Dockerfile matched to the actual stack — PHP version and extensions, Node, database engine, Redis, queues, mail. Includes /dev-env:init to generate and /dev-env:review to audit existing docker files. Pairs with stack-scan.
